devnet_status.highlight: Devnet-3 stable since March 24; 115+ hours runtime, 100K+ slots finalized
Multiple clients experiencing stalls and checkpoint sync issues requiring investigation
Median 2 signatures aggregated per slot; expected ~13 with current validator count
Finalization delay: 20-82 slots observed vs expected 3-slot finality
Frequent reorgs occurring (0-12 per period) requiring investigation

devnet4_progress.highlight: Ream: Key separation PR near completion; Devnet-4 ready end of week
Lantern: Devnet-4 PR449 support complete; additional PRs under review
LeanVM Devnet-4 branch ready: recursive aggregation, Poseidon1, ZK-friendly encoding

research_and_spec.highlight: Major Plonky3 PR submitted integrating improvements; Poseidon optimizations merged
Post-quantum pubkey registry research post in preparation; DM for feedback
Good first issues attracting external contributors; Python spec contributions increasing

infrastructure_and_metrics.highlight: Observatory tool launched: Jupyter notebooks analyze Prometheus metrics by devnet period
Network usage 24Mbps (13 validators); EIP-7870 recommends 50Mbps minimum
Multi-subnet mesh topology PR incoming; aggregators listen to multiple subnets
Automated interop testing framework available; runs client combinations programmatically

organizational.highlight: No call April 1 (EthCC); next call April 8 @ 14:00 UTC
Beast Mode (Saturday) and Fort Mode (Sunday) events in Cannes this weekend
